title: Asuka is hot

[]: Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Sep 05, 2010 6:20 am An 'Asuka is Hot' thread without an 'Asuka is Hot' pic is a fail thread, so here's a pic: Asuka is hot  SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by ran1 » Sun Sep 05, 2010 8:01 am As one of the few (and in denial) Misato/Shinji psuedo-shippers I might as well note that though Asuka is indeed "hot" she's got nothing on Misato and she knows it.

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 05, 2010 8:05 am ran1 wrote: As one of the few (and in denial) Misato/Shinji psuedo-shippers I might as well note that though Asuka is indeed "hot" she's got nothing on Misato and she knows it.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 05, 2010 8:33 am ran1 wrote: Misato/Shinji psuedo-shippers

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Sep 05, 2010 8:46 am Maya is hot! >///<

[]: Post by Merridian » Sun Sep 05, 2010 8:49 am Fem-Kiel is hottest of all. But yes, Asuka is also hot. Almost as hot as Ritsuko and Misato and Maya and fem-Toji. And fem-Kaworu.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 05, 2010 9:03 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: Maya is hot! >///<

[]: Post by Merridian » Sun Sep 05, 2010 9:17 am @NemZ : Adorable? Sure, but... SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 05, 2010 9:55 am When I first watched NGE, I thought that Maya was Shinji´s big sister or something. *coughcough*

[]: Post by DevRei17 » Sun Sep 05, 2010 9:56 am Xard wrote: Misato is hottest

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 05, 2010 10:34 am Not saying she isn't attractive by any means... just that she's more of a Mary Anne than a Ginger, so to speak. I'm going to start shipping Maya and Amy Wong, just because. Cute Asian science majors cartoon girls should stick together. ...also Asuka/Zapp Brannigan.

[]: Post by The-Happy-Go-Lucky-Wacko » Sun Sep 05, 2010 10:52 am Ritsuko plz.

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 05, 2010 10:58 am The-Happy-Go-Lucky-Wacko wrote: Ritsuko plz.
